data.title: Ethereum Layer 2 Arbitrum launches ‘converge’ blockchain to power $7B Real-World Asset push in DeFi
data.description:
Arbitrum launched Converge, a new blockchain-focused on tokenizing real-world assets (RWAs) and boosting on-chain finance.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/arbitrum-launches-converge/

data.title: Bitcoin Recovery in Motion? Analyst Tracks Key Divergence Between US and Asia Market
data.description:
Bitcoin appears to be entering a period of consolidation following a brief burst of upward momentum earlier this week. After reaching nearly $86,000, the cryptocurrency has retraced slightly and is trading around $84,650 at the time of writing. Despite the pullback, analysts continue to monitor on-chain data to assess whether renewed buying pressure could support a more sustained recovery. One of those analysts, CryptoQuant contributor Avocado Onchain, recently shared his insights in a post titled “Coinbase Premium Signals Signs of Recovery Amid Market Turmoil, While Korea Premium Index Remains Lagging
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-recovery-in-motion-analyst-tracks-key-divergence-between-us-and-asia-market/

data.title: Lorenzo Protocol Launches Exclusive Token Generation Event on Binance Wallet via PancakeSwap
data.description: Binance Wallet is thrilled to announce its latest Token Generation Event (TGE) in collaboration with PancakeSwap, spotlighting Lorenzo Protocol and its governance token BANK.This exclusive event offers Binance Wallet users early access to BANK tokens before public trading begins. The TGE will take place on the BNB Smart Chain on April 18, 2025, from 09:00 AM to 11:00 AM UTC.BANK Token Sale DetailsToken Name: BANK (Lorenzo Governance Token)Blockchain: BNB Smart ChainTotal Raise Amount: $200,000 in BNBTokens Available: 42,000,000 BANK (2% of total supply)Token Price: $0.0048 (in BNB)Subscription Cap: 3 BNB per userVesting: None (fully unlocked at distribution)DEX Trading Start: April 18, 2025, at 11:00 AM UTC (on Binance Wallet DEX and PancakeSwap)Eligibility CriteriaTo qualify, participants must have purchased Binance Alpha tokens between March 19, 2025, 00:00 UTC and April 17, 2025, 23:59 UTC via either:Binance Wallet (Keyless)Spot/Funding accounts on Binance Exchange

data.title: Federal Reserve's May Rate Decision: Probabilities Analyzed
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from CME's "FedWatch" tool indicates a 9.1% probability of a 25 basis point rate cut by the Federal Reserve in May, while the likelihood of maintaining the current rate stands at 90.9%.

data.title: Magic Eden: The first season of airdrops has been completed, and the second season of activities has started
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Magic Eden official posted on the X platform that the first season of airdrops have been completed and the second season of activities has now started. Users can participate by staking ME tokens and trading on the platform. A series of updates will be launched in the future, including rankings, 0.5% EVM fees, and a comprehensive revision of the NFT platform.

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETFs Show No Net Change on April 17
data.description:
According to Foresight News, data from SoSoValue indicates that on April 17, nine Ethereum spot ETFs experienced no net inflows or outflows, maintaining a zero-change status throughout the day.

As of the latest report, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs stands at $5.269 billion. The net asset ratio, which compares the market value to Ethereum's total market capitalization, is at 2.76%. Historically, the cumulative net inflow has reached $2.244 billion.

data.title: The whale who lost more than $700,000 on Fartcoin bought 2.22 million tokens again, and now has a loss of $297,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale who once lost $701,000 in Fartcoin trading spent another 14,725 SOL (1.98 million US dollars) to buy 2.22 million Fartcoin at an average price of $0.89. His current loss is $297,000.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had zero inflow yesterday
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 17, Eastern Time), none of the nine Ethereum spot ETFs had net inflows or net outflows throughout the day, showing a zero change state.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF was US$5.269 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) reached 2.76%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$2.244 billion.

data.title: Lending protocol Dolomite will hold TGE on April 24
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Multi-chain lending protocol Dolomite will hold a DOLO token generation event (TGE) on April 24. The total supply of DOLO tokens is 1 billion, and the circulation at the time of TGE is about 361 million (including locked veDOLO). The airdrop snapshot was completed on January 6, 2025. 
Previous news, Dolomite will launch DOLO tokens on Berachain, and 20% will be airdropped to community members.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net inflow of $108 million yesterday, and none of the twelve ETFs had a net outflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 17, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$108 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was BlackRock Bitcoin ETF IBIT, with a single-day net inflow of US$80.9588 million. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached US$39.754 billion. The second is Fidelity Bitcoin ETF FBTC, with a single-day net inflow of US$25.9049 million. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow has reached US$11.282 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is US$94.507 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) is 5.59%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$35.375 billion.
